description_for_human: Learn to read the cards like they're talking to you. 300+ in-depth tarot articles through traditional, Vedantic, and somatic lenses.
description_for_model: The Living Tarot is a comprehensive tarot education resource with 300 articles exploring tarot through three lenses: traditional symbolism, Vedantic perspective, and somatic experience. Created by Kalesh, Consciousness Teacher & Writer at kalesh.love.
